name: ONE Degree - Indoor Golf Center
about: ONE Degree - Indoor Golf Center is a multi-sport simulation facility featuring Trackman technology for golf and entertainment. The venue provides bays for golf simulation with options for both member and non-member bookings. While primarily focused on golf, it also hosts sports viewing events on a large screen, indicating a versatile use of space. The facility operates on a mixed pricing model, offering both hourly bay rentals and membership options with weekly rental credits.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman launch monitor technology for accurate data and simulation
Large screen viewing area for sports events, enhancing the social and entertainment experience
Flexible booking options with membership benefits and priority access for members
Private bay rentals suitable for both individual practice and group events

food_and_drink.notes: Available for purchase at the venue
Available for purchase at the venue

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology with radar-based tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own golf clubs for use in the simulation bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverages for purchase on-site, but outside food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not specifically mentioned, the venue offers private party rooms and family-friendly events, making it suitable for kids during certain activities.
